title: lathyrus incanus
intro: Lathyrus incanus is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, known for its delicate white or pink flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Lathyrus incanus include its ability to aid in digestion and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
